ratingDrivers.description: Two mutation endpoints have no replay semantics in the contract.
Contract examples cover duplicate retries, authorization failures, and validation errors; interrupted-write examples are absent with the same gap as replay semantics.

localAnalysis.rationale: Two mutation endpoints and one interrupted-write example remain incomplete; the rest are specified.
